name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.14.0: doctor-worker now probes auto-compact firing count via isCompactSummary:true markers in session jsonl; REFRESH thresholds (1=note, 2=warn, 3=refuse) surface context-pressure the controller cannot observe directly; AUDIT step 13 surfaces Claude Code built-in Auto-Memory alongside claude-md-improver. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear refs (harness-driven). v1.12.0 ships dep-drift detector via dev-loop:doctor-worker (sonnet) probing dependencies.yaml; required-missing blocks, optional-missing warns + DEP_DRIFT session var drives fallback paths; wrapper-agent pattern documented. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker agent (sonnet). Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. Simplify-worker for code review gate. Pluggable interview phase. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds all 12 config sections (A-L). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
